frozen_baseline.note: Qwen2-VL-2B before fine-tuning; α-independent (same frozen model).

generative_control.note: uniform next-token CE (rq2_qwen2vl_generative_scienceqa); equivalent to explanation_aware at alpha_eff = N_ans/(N_ans+N_exp) approximately 0.1 on ScienceQA.

notes.shape: mc_accuracy is an inverted-U peaking at alpha=0.1 (0.775) and dropping ~10 pp at both extremes (0.675 at 0.0, 0.680 at 1.0). ROUGE-L/BLEU peak at alpha=0.1 (0.706/0.579) and fall monotonically as alpha rises, reaching 0.000 at alpha=1.0.
notes.generative_coincidence: The best point (alpha=0.1) is within seed noise of the generative control (0.765/0.703/0.570), confirming alpha_eff approximately 0.1: explicit answer-weighting cannot beat the weighting uniform CE already applies.
notes.explanation_supervision_helps_accuracy: alpha=1.0 (answer-only) scores 0.680 vs 0.775 at alpha=0.1 -- a ~9.5 pp accuracy loss when the rationale span is unsupervised, evidence the generated rationale functions as a usable chain-of-thought at inference.
notes.alpha_100: answer-only: explanation span unsupervised, so the model emits no rationale -> ROUGE-L/BLEU vs gold ~ 0.
notes.alpha_000: explanation-only: answer span unsupervised; both accuracy (0.675) and rationale quality (0.449) are low -- with no answer anchor the rationale drifts off the concise gold.
notes.alpha_050_reconciliation: An earlier standalone run (rq3_qwen2vl_explanation_aware_scienceqa.json) scored alpha=0.5 at mc_accuracy 0.755, with rouge_l/bleu identical to the sweep (0.6526/0.5049). The sweep's 0.740 is treated as canonical (one consistent six-point run); the 1.5 pp mc gap (3/200 examples) is run-to-run/scoring noise.
